parts.name: [THE RAGE GAUGE]
parts.summary: [THE RAGE GAUGE] The Rage Gauge rises as you take damage from attacks. When it hits MAX, you can use Knocking-on-the-Sword moves and try to turn things around with a single blow. [RAGE EXPLOSIONS] Activating the "Rage Explosion" enables the use of invincible attacks that knock back enemy attacks even as you take damage and the Sword Gauge shoots up to MAX. T...
